12 weeks into 2026 and already 8 BIG open source LLM's have dropped.  MiniMax-M.27 just dropped and for $100 a YEAR you can call it 1500 times every 5 hours.  That's DIRT CHEAP.  Local LLM's are cool and powerful, but if you don't want to spend $8K on hardware you don't have to.

@TheAhmadOsman
, local LLMs offer crucial autonomy in intelligence utilization.
